sub_modules.fp_operand_classify: Extracts sign, exponent, and mantissa fields and classifies zero, infinity, NaN, and denormal operands.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Handles NaN, infinity, infinity-times-zero, and zero special-case results and exception flags.
sub_modules.fp_significand_multiply: Builds effective significands, computes signed exponent sum with bias adjustment, result sign, and raw significand product.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round: Normalizes the raw product, applies rounding mode, flushes underflow to zero, detects overflow, and emits the packed result.
